options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: logic
options.description: Choose the logic used by the randomizer.

options.name: skip_intro
options.description:
Skips escaping the police station.

Graffiti spots tagged during the intro will not unlock items.

options.name: skip_dreams
options.description:
Skips the dream sequences at the end of each chapter.

This can be changed later in the options menu inside the Archipelago phone app.

options.name: skip_statue_hands
options.description: Skips spraying the lion statue hands after the dream in Chapter 5.

options.name: total_rep
options.description:
Change the total amount of REP in your world.

At least 960 REP is needed to finish the game.

Will be rounded to the nearest number divisible by 8.

options.name: extra_rep_required
options.description: Changes the final boss to require 1000 REP instead of 960 REP to start.

options.name: starting_movestyle
options.description: Choose which movestyle to start with.

options.name: limited_graffiti
options.description:
Each graffiti design can only be used a limited number of times before being removed from your inventory.

In some cases, such as completing a dream, using graffiti to defeat enemies, or spraying over your own graffiti, uses will not be counted.

If enabled, doing graffiti is disabled during crew battles, to prevent softlocking.

options.name: small_graffiti_uses
options.description:
Choose if small graffiti should be separate, meaning that you will need to switch characters every time you run out, or combined, meaning that unlocking new characters will add 5 uses that any character can use.

Has no effect if Limited Graffiti is disabled.

options.name: skip_polo_photos
options.description: Skip taking pictures of Polo for items.

options.name: dont_save_photos
options.description:
Photos taken with the Camera app will not be saved.

This can be changed later in the options menu inside the Archipelago phone app.

options.name: score_difficulty
options.description:
Alters the score required to win score challenges and crew battles.

This can be changed later in the options menu inside the Archipelago phone app.

options.name: damage_multiplier
options.description:
Multiplies all damage received.

At 3x, most damage will OHKO the player, including falling into pits.
At 6x, all damage will OHKO the player.

This can be changed later in the options menu inside the Archipelago phone app.

options.name: death_link
options.description:
When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

    This can be changed later in the options menu inside the Archipelago phone app.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
